name: a health fact captured in a general note ratchets up to health
description: docs/ANALYSIS.md domain firewall: 'domain can ratchet UP without review, never down' — misclassifying INTO health is cheap, a leak OUT of it is not. A note captured in `general` whose content is clearly health (an A1c lab value) emits a fact with domain=health. ratchet_domain(extracted=health, note_domain=general) returns (health, needs_promotion=False): the fact silently LANDS in health and NO domain_promotion review is filed (ratcheting up from general is free; promotion review fires only when a fact would move DOWN/ACROSS and gets held in the note's domain). This pins the cheap, no-friction up-ratchet.

steps.body: Got my lab results back — A1c came in at 6.8 percent.
